ddls:
CREATE TABLE "protected_areas" (
  "pa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protected area */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the protected area is located */,
  "pa_designation" TEXT /* Designation of the protected area (e.g., Sanctuary) */,
  "pa_designation_type" TEXT /* Type of designation (e.g., National) */,
  "pa_gis_area" REAL /* Geographic area of the protected area in square kilometers */,
  "pa_iucn" TEXT /* IUCN category of the protected area */,
  "pa_location" TEXT /* Geographic location code */,
  "pa_name" TEXT /* Name of the protected area in English */,
  "pa_name_local" TEXT /* Local name of the protected area */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the information was recorded */,
  "pa_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the protected area */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* The date when the PA was established */,
  "management_authority" TEXT /* The organization responsible for managing the PA */,
  "last_assessment_date" TEXT /* The date of the last ecological assessment */,
  "protected_area_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of protected area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protected_areas_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protected_areas_protected_area_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("protected_area_type_id") REFERENCES protected_area_types ("pa_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protected_areas_pa_iucn FOREIGN KEY ("pa_iucn") REFERENCES iucn_categories ("iucn_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "vegetation_indices" (
  "vi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vegetation index record */,
  "pa_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protected area */,
  "max_evi" REAL /* Maximum EVI recorded */,
  "max_ndvi" REAL /* Maximum NDVI recorded */,
  "mean_evi" REAL /* Mean EVI value */,
  "mean_ndvi" REAL /* Mean NDVI value */,
  "median_evi" REAL /* Median EVI value */,
  "median_ndvi" REAL /* Median NDVI value */,
  "min_evi" REAL /* Minimum EVI recorded */,
  "min_ndvi" REAL /* Minimum NDVI recorded */,
  "stddev_evi" REAL /* Standard deviation of EVI */,
  "stddev_ndvi" REAL /* Standard deviation of NDVI */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date when the vegetation indices were recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the indices */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_indices_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_indices_pa_id FOREIGN KEY ("pa_id") REFERENCES protected_areas ("pa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* The population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* The total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* The type of government in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "iucn_categories" (
  "iucn_code" TEXT /* Code of the IUCN category */,
  "iucn_description" TEXT /* Description of the IUCN category */,
  "is_protected" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the category is protected */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date the category was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iucn_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_coordinates" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic coordinate entry */,
  "pa_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protected area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the protected area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the protected area */,
  "geo_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic reference (e.g., centroid, boundary) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* The elevation at the geographic coordinate */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* The accuracy of the coordinate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geo_coordinates_pa_id FOREIGN KEY ("pa_id") REFERENCES protected_areas ("pa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protected_area_types" (
  "pa_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protected area type */,
  "pa_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the protected area type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the protected area type */,
  "is_managed" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the type is managed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date the type was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pa_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* The first name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* The last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "pa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protected area being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pa_id FOREIGN KEY ("pa_id") REFERENCES protected_areas ("pa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protected_area_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "pa_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protected area */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being recorded */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the recorded data */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protected_area_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protected_area_data_pa_id FOREIGN KEY ("pa_id") REFERENCES protected_areas ("pa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "pa_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protected area */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of the report (e.g., vegetation, habitat) */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* The author of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_reports_pa_id FOREIGN KEY ("pa_id") REFERENCES protected_areas ("pa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., satellite, ground survey) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_quality" TEXT /* The quality of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date the source was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
